narrative:
Dover (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,178 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.0 percentage points.
